# Sprint 5.2 Dashboard Design

**Project:** urban-parking-optimization-system
**Sprint:** Sprint 5. Stakeholder Dashboards
**Objective:** Develop stakeholder dashboards to provide transparent, role-specific insights and ensure alignment across city leadership, operations, and the public.

## Description
Design and implement dashboards with row-level security, including high-level KPIs, predictive hotspot maps, foot traffic correlations, and sentiment tracking.
